no-hardcoded-glass-morphism.message: Use <GlassCard> from @/components/primitives instead of hardcoded glass-morphism classes

no-hardcoded-interactive-cards.message: Use <InteractiveCard> from @/components/primitives instead of hardcoded hover effects

no-hardcoded-badge-colors.message: Use <StatusBadge> from @/components/primitives instead of hardcoded badge colors

prefer-primitive-floating-button.message: Use <FloatingAction> from @/components/primitives instead of hardcoded floating buttons

prefer-primitive-nav-header.message: Use <NavHeader> from @/components/primitives instead of hardcoded sticky headers
